name: Potato Puff
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together well the potatoes, egg substitute, onion flakes, and mixed seasoning. Set aside.
2. Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry. Stir 1/4 of the beaten egg whites into the potatoes to lighten the mixture.
3. Fold the potatoes into the remaining beaten egg whites.
4. Turn the mixture into a 1-quart casserole dish. Sprinkle with cheese.
5. Bake in a 400°F oven for 20 minutes until puffed and set. Serve at once. Makes 4 servings.
per serving:
69 Kcal 0.6g fat (0.3g sat fat) 7% CFF 390mg Na 6g fiber (4.8g PRO/0.6g FAT/11.6g CHO)
